name: vocab-master
description: Offline desktop vocabulary trainer with SM-2 spaced repetition for English learners.

scripts.test: python -m unittest discover -s tests && node tests/core-utils.test.js && node tests/learning-intelligence.test.js && node tests/sm2-scheduler.test.js && node tests/search-utils.test.js && node tests/stats-renderer.test.js && node tests/memory-curve.test.js && node tests/tts.test.js && node tests/morphology.test.js && node tests/settings-ui.test.js && node tests/backup-actions.test.js && node tests/word-form.test.js && node tests/error-book.test.js && node tests/keyboard-shortcuts.test.js
scripts.check: python scripts/check_python_syntax.py && python scripts/check_version_consistency.py && python scripts/validate_wordbanks.py && python scripts/validate_public_site.py && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/core-utils.js && node --check src/learning-intelligence.js && node --check src/sm2-scheduler.js && node --check src/search-utils.js && node --check src/stats-renderer.js && node --check src/memory-curve.js && node --check src/tts.js && node --check src/morphology.js && node --check src/settings-ui.js && node --check src/backup-actions.js && node --check src/word-form.js && node --check src/error-book.js && node --check src/keyboard-shortcuts.js

author: VocabMaster contributors
